scripts.build:design-spec: node --import tsx packages/ddd-spec-cli/cli.ts build && node --import tsx design-spec/tools/sync-viewer-spec.ts
scripts.verify:design-spec: npm run build:design-spec && npm run test:ddd-spec && (node -e "process.exit(require('node:fs').existsSync('apps/design-spec-viewer/node_modules') ? 0 : 1)" || npm --prefix apps/design-spec-viewer install --no-fund --no-audit) && node apps/design-spec-viewer/node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc --noEmit && npm --prefix apps/design-spec-viewer run build
